text.title: FinOps OPERATE Phase — Governance and Cost Gates Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree verifies INFORM/OPTIMIZE complete and prereqs hold.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: wire-ci-cost-gate
step.action: Integrate Infracost into PR pipeline; set max_delta_usd_per_pr.

step.name: provision-auto-stop
step.action: Configure idle detection + auto-stop for non-prod envs.

step.name: codify-policies-validate
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
